data: {"generalSituation":"Under the influence of the northeast monsoon, it will be appreciably cooler over the coast of Guangdong today. Meanwhile, upper-air disturbances will bring showers and squally thunderstorms to the region. Showers will be heavy at times. With the upper-air disturbances departing, the weather will improve slightly over the coast of Guangdong during the weekend. A trough of low pressure is expected to develop gradually over southern China early to midweek next week. The weather will become unsettled again over the region.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260424","week":"Friday","forecastWind":"North to northeast force 4.","forecastWeather":"Cloudy with occasional showers and a few squally thunderstorms. Showers will be heavy at times.
